title: Set the amount of Acceleration.
comment: Set the amount of Acceleration.

title: Determine if the character is moving by getting it's speed. The Speed equals the length of the horizontal (x y) velocity, so it does not take vertical movement into account. If the character is moving, update the last velocity rotation. This value is saved because it might be useful to know the last orientation of movement even after the character has stopped.
comment: Determine if the character is moving by getting it's speed. The Speed equals the length of the horizontal (x y) velocity, so it does not take vertical movement into account. If the character is moving, update the last velocity rotation. This value is saved because it might be useful to know the last orientation of movement even after the character has stopped.

title: Determine if the character has movement input by getting its movement input amount. The Movement Input Amount is equal to the current acceleration divided by the max acceleration so that it has a range of 0-1, 1 being the maximum possible amount of input, and 0 beiung none. If the character has movement input, update the Last Movement Input Rotation.
comment: Determine if the character has movement input by getting its movement input amount. The Movement Input Amount is equal to the current acceleration divided by the max acceleration so that it has a range of 0-1, 1 being the maximum possible amount of input, and 0 beiung none. If the character has movement input, update the Last Movement Input Rotation.

title: Set the Aim Yaw rate by comparing the current and previous Aim Yaw value, divided by Delta Seconds. This represents the speed the camera is rotating left to right.
comment: Set the Aim Yaw rate by comparing the current and previous Aim Yaw value, divided by Delta Seconds. This represents the speed the camera is rotating left to right.

title: These values represent how the capsule is moving as well as how it wants to move, and therefore are essential for any data driven animation system. They are also used throughout the system for various functions, so I found it is easiest to manage them all in one place.
comment: These values represent how the capsule is moving as well as how it wants to move, and therefore are essential for any data driven animation system. They are also used throughout the system for various functions, so I found it is easiest to manage them all in one place.

title: Get movement data from the Movement Model Data table and set the Movement Data Struct. This allows you to easily switch out movement behaviors.
comment: Get movement data from the Movement Model Data table and set the Movement Data Struct. This allows you to easily switch out movement behaviors.
terms: Get movement data from the Movement Model Data table and set the Movement Data Struct. This allows you to easily switch out movement behaviors.
